mapper.sql: id, project_id, config_id, task_id, report_name, report_type, template_id, engine_type, current_version_id, status, progress, preview_url, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into report_config ( project_id, config_name, report_type, template_id, reference_file_ids, knowledge_base_ids, data_source_ids, generation_params, status, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{configName}, #{reportType}, #{templateId}, #{referenceFileIds}, #{knowledgeBaseIds}, #{dataSourceIds}, #{generationParams}, #{status}, 1, 1 )

insert into report ( project_id, config_id, task_id, report_name, report_type, template_id, engine_type, status, progress, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{configId}, #{taskId}, #{reportName}, #{reportType}, #{templateId}, #{engineType}, #{status}, #{progress}, 1, 1 )

insert into generate_task ( project_id, task_type, biz_type, biz_id, status, current_stage, max_retry_count, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{taskType}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{status}, #{currentStage}, #{maxRetryCount}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update: update report set task_id = #{taskId}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{reportId} and deleted = 0
update generate_task set biz_id = #{bizId}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select from report where id = #{reportId} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update report set status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, error_message = null, finished_at = null, started_at = coalesce(started_at, current_timestamp), updated_by = 1 where id = #{reportId} and deleted = 0

update report set current_version_id = #{versionId}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, preview_url = #{previewUrl}, error_message = null, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = 1 where id = #{reportId} and deleted = 0
update report set status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = 1 where id = #{reportId} and deleted = 0

update generate_task set status = #{status}, current_stage = #{currentStage}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, started_at = case when #{status} = 'RUNNING' then coalesce(started_at, current_timestamp) else started_at end, finished_at = case when #{status} in ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED') then current_timestamp else finished_at end, updated_by = 1 where id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, project_id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, object_name, content_type, file_size, status, metadata from file_object where id = #{fileId} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into file_object ( project_id, biz_type, biz_id, file_name, object_name, content_type, file_size, status, metadata, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{fileName}, #{objectName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{status}, #{metadata}, 1, 1 )

insert into report_version ( project_id, report_id, version_no, word_file_id, pdf_file_id, source_snapshot, engine_response, content_hash, status, error_message, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{projectId}, #{reportId}, #{versionNo}, #{wordFileId}, #{pdfFileId}, #{sourceSnapshot}, #{engineResponse}, #{contentHash}, #{status}, #{errorMessage}, 1, 1 )
mapper.select: select id, project_id, report_id, task_id, template_id, template_file_id, knowledge_base_id, variable_name, variable_description, variable_value, sort_no, status, provider_trace_id, references_json, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by from report_variable_value where report_id = #{reportId} and deleted = 0 order by sort_no asc, id asc
mapper.update: update report_variable_value set status = 'RUNNING', variable_value = null, provider_trace_id = null, references_json = '[]', error_message = null, started_at = current_timestamp, finished_at = null, updated_by = 1 where id = #{variableId} and task_id = #{taskId} and status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and deleted = 0

update report_variable_value set status = 'SUCCESS', variable_value = #{variableValue}, references_json = #{referencesJson}, provider_trace_id = #{providerTraceId}, error_message = null, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = 1 where id = #{variableId} and task_id = #{taskId} and status = 'RUNNING' and deleted = 0

update report_variable_value set status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = current_timestamp, updated_by = 1 where id = #{variableId} and task_id = #{taskId} and status = 'RUNNING' and deleted = 0
update report_version set word_file_id = #{wordFileId}, content_hash = #{contentHash}, updated_by = 1 where id = #{versionId} and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, project_id, config_name, report_type, template_id, reference_file_ids, knowledge_base_ids, data_source_ids, generation_params, status from report_config where id = #{configId} and deleted = 0
select rv.word_file_id from report r join report_version rv on rv.id = r.current_version_id and rv.deleted = 0 where r.id = #{reportId} and r.deleted = 0 and rv.word_file_id is not null
